n: Breaking the Back of the Boar

steps.t: The entrance to the Boar-tribe lair is south of Beaconwatch, not far from the Mering-Stream. Cúthing wants you to travel to the Boar-tribe lair and de…
Cúthing is standing near Meregyth, outside the Mead Hall of Beaconwatch. You should return to Beaconwatch and tell Cúthing about your victory.
